/usr/bin/g++ -std=c++23 -ggdb -DDTYPE_IN=float -DDTYPE_OUT=float -DDTYPE_ACC=float -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/single_core.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/single_core.dir/single_core/test.cpp.o -o single_core   -L/opt/xilinx/xrt/lib  -L/home/diac/private/mlir-aie/ironenv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/mlir_aie/runtime_lib/x86_64/test_lib/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/xilinx/xrt/lib:/home/diac/private/mlir-aie/ironenv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/mlir_aie/runtime_lib/x86_64/test_lib/lib -lxrt_coreutil -lfftw3 -lfftw3f -ltest_utils
